/usr/bin/ar qc libSERVER_CORE.a CMakeFiles/SERVER_CORE.dir/Interpreter/Runtime/CommandHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SERVER_CORE.dir/Interpreter/Runtime/Executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SERVER_CORE.dir/Interpreter/Runtime/StorageEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SERVER_CORE.dir/Interpreter/Parsing/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SERVER_CORE.dir/Interpreter/Statements/Statement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SERVER_CORE.dir/Interpreter/Tokens/Token.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SERVER_CORE.dir/Interpreter/Parsing/Tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SERVER_CORE.dir/TCP/Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SERVER_CORE.dir/Utility/util.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libSERVER_CORE.a
